_note: User tapped a button in an Icebreaker (conversation starter) or a Generic Template button. Arrives as a 'messaging_postbacks' event — NOT a 'messages' event. 'postback.payload' is the developer-defined string set on the button. 'postback.title' is the button label. Handle this separately from message events. No 'messaging_type' field on Instagram. Subscribe to 'messaging_postbacks' webhook field to receive these.
